highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for CKS Teja Institute of Dental Sciences and Research admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: I am not sure about the placements, but the post-graduation and MS are quite satisfactory. The staff is good. Postings are given in the college hospital itself. The college has a hospital, where we can have clinical experience and good practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure, but the hostel is a bit hard. Facilities are also better in the college. We also have labs with better equipment. There are 11 departments in our course. Each lab is better with its equipment and the food served is also good in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is not up to the mark. It is a good college with good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Every year almost 100 students get seats in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every department is provided with facilities like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned, library, discussion room and seminar hall. The hostel facility is good comparatively, but the food served is bad. It can accommodate around 800 students, including both boys and girls. The hostel has a separate mess for both boys and girls. The hostel is very well secured. It also consists of a research centre where around 500 out-patients are registered every day.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well qualified. They are BDS (Bachelor of dental surgery) and MS masters in dental surgery. The course curriculum will definitely make the students industry-ready. Students prefer to establish an independent clinic. It provides several job opportunities for students. The highest salary is offered to the head of the department, followed by professors. There are A category, B category and C category seats in our college where B and C are payment seats and A category is a government seat. It's a five-year course, and the post-graduation is for 3 years.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 100 students were placed yearly. There are no specific jobs and only a few hospitals recruit freshers. Private clinics offer very little pay like Rs.8,000 to 15,000 per month. There are very less companies recruiting dentists. Students should do one-year rotary internship in our college itself. Top role offered is a cosmetic dental surgeon.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has well-equipped labs and a very good library with all kinds of books for reference. There are well-ventilated classrooms. Hostel was a little bit crowded. In the mess and canteen, the food was not so good. There will be sports and games facilities. There is a very large ground and basketball court.

individual_reviews.title: This is a very good college.

content.Placements: Quality of the placements is very impressive because around 120 companies visit our campus for placements. The placement ratio is around 90%. faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: This is a very good college for choosing Bachelor of pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: 2012-2015 batch at Nirmala college of pharmacy B.Pharma course about 60 students was there out 4 students left after one year. Because course is little bit tough. After completion around 50% are placed on campus interviews and others joined in private sector some are residue course due to supply exams. The package was 80000 per year. Recruiting companies include micro labs, Glenmark, ipca etc. Some got internship on nearby hospitals like niramala hospital muvattupuzha and ernakulam hospitals lissie, rajagiri. placements.overview:
North Orissa University (NOU Orissa), is located in Orissa. Established in 1998, it is a public university approved by AICTE. North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) provides 53 UG, PG and Advanced Masters courses in 12 specialisations, namely Agriculture, Botany, Chemistry, Computer Science and Computer Science Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in both Full Time and Part Time modes. M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc. and MCA are some of the courses offered at North Orissa University (NOU Orissa). Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. The total fee at North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) ranges between INR 20,000 to 1,25,000. North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) has a student intake of 48 for all the courses. The average median package at North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) is INR 4,17,778. North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

The formerly known as North Orissa University, now known as Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University, offers admission based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 for admission to UG-level programmes.

Whereas, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation to qualify for a PG-level programme. Furthermore, candidates must visit the official website of the University to apply for the admission process. Candidates must register for candidature through the student portal or enquire about the same through the University administration office. Upon confirmation, candidates must fill out the application form.

Students can choose Full Time and Part Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fee structure for the North Orissa University (NOU Orissa) programmes is around INR 20,000 to 1,25,000.

review_summary.college_name: North Orissa University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty and infrastructure, placement and facilities.

content.Placements: One is placed from here till now, and companies are not visiting here. For only a degree college is best, they are only focusing on academic growth, not skills and knowledge. There is no such career development programme or anything, they don't provide any internship.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom facilities are in poor condition, with no proper electricity, no smart classroom, and only Wi-Fi available. The campus is also not clean, classrooms are broken for other streams, it is good, but not for professional courses, so don't take admission in professional courses.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: We are not happy with this college. Our college needs a makeover.

content.Placements: We don't know, actually, how many students are placed in our course. The highest salary is 6-7 LPA, the lowest is 2-2.5 LPA, and the mid salary is 3 to 4 LPA. The company will hire only 60% scoring students, or else students can try their career in teaching or pursue business.
content.Infrastructure: We do have facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom and library, but our Wi-Fi doesn't work, and the internet is so slow. We have a library, but we don't have book 14 we have in our course. We have a lab, but the computer on the left doesn't work. No, I don't have cater.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with faculty. Overall average experience with the infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I think any student can get placed in this course. 6 to 7 LPA is the highest package, 2–2.5 LPA is the lowest package, and 3–5 LPA is the average package. Most recruiting companies are the ones that provide internships, for example, Tech Mahindra, HCL, Wipro, etc. The top roles offered include web developer, software developer, QA tester, technical support, and IT executive.
content.Infrastructure: The department is very small. We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I am not sure about the book availability in the library, but we do have one. I don’t know much about the hostel because I stay in a PG. For BCA students, the college does not provide a hostel. The hostel likely has a canteen and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the very good infrastructure and modern facilities.

content.Placements: About 30 per cent of students were placed in various private and government agencies. Salary package varies from 2 LPA to 10 LPA. Various private companies and architectural companies are taking students. About 40 per cent of students got internships from our course in various government and private companies after their course completion.
content.Infrastructure: Various modern facilities and infrastructure are available in our department. 24 hour free Wi-Fi for all students, modern library with various facilities. All classes are smart classrooms that provide a good study environment. Various old and new books are available in our central library. Hostel quality is also good, it feels like your own home. Food quality is moderate to good. All medical facilities are available with first aid. Various sports and games materials are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's the best college in Betnoti.

content.Placements: No campus placement support is available in this college. Some students of the previous batch got jobs with the help of our lecturer, who helped them get jobs from off-campus. Companies like Wipro and TCS give an offer letter to students. The average package is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Inside the college, a canteen is available, which provides meals at a low price. In college, more than 3 Wi-Fi networks are available. Classrooms are very good, labs are very good, and everything is available in the lab for students. There is no hostel available for students. And no games are organised.

The hostels are well facilitated with the common room where Boarders are provided with newspapers, indoor games, television etc. The hostels have a common mess facility with good hygiene. Reprographic Facility is also available for the students in Library.

library.description: The central library of the North Orissa University has more than 51000 text and reference books in different subjects besides books of common interest. The Library is fully automated with the use of RFID, Smart Cards, Check-in Checkout Kiosk and Gate Antenna Systems.

Besides, Government Medical College, Sri Ganganagar considers scores in NEET and Rajasthan NEET for admission to specific courses.Government Medical College, Sri Ganganagaroffers courses at the UG level.
The college offers UG programmes for 66 months.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,73,600.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Government Medical College, Sri Ganganagar NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13407 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Sri Ganganagar MBBS cutoff 2025 was 13407 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13425 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Sri Ganganagar accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling.
